inputs.high_level_description: A 1960s retro spy thriller movie poster for "The Crimson Cipher", featuring a silhouetted secret agent in a charcoal suit and fedora against a deep oxblood red field, with a glowing red laser beam, a pale yellow moon disc, and a brutalist city skyline.
inputs.background: A deep oxblood red full-bleed poster background fills the entire vertical composition with no border. Subtle paper grain and faint halftone texture cover the surface for a vintage screen-print feel. Along the lower-middle area, a silhouetted skyline of angular brutalist towers recedes into hazy grey depth. A wet rooftop ledge runs along the bottom edge with rain-slick reflections in muted gold and red. The overall mood is classic 1960s espionage poster design with a limited elegant palette.
inputs.style.art_style: 1960s retro movie poster illustration, flat ink shapes, minimal shading, screen-print texture, subtle halftone grain, vintage paper texture, classic espionage poster design
inputs.aesthetics: bold, retro, graphic, cinematic, dramatic, vintage, high contrast, elegant espionage mood
inputs.lighting: flat screen-printed poster lighting, dramatic contrast, pale yellow circular backlight behind the agent, subtle glow from a red laser beam, moody vintage print atmosphere
inputs.elements_data:

His right hand is in his trouser pocket, and his left hand holds a lit cigarette near hip height with a thin curl of smoke rising upward.
